overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The player character walks under elevated highways, crosses busy intersections, and enters a pedestrian plaza, ending with a close-up observation of NPCs resting on benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath elevated highway with neon decorations

events.description: futuristic black van passes by on the right side of the street
approaching the open intersection with brighter ambient light from the opening

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the neon-lit street and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black van driving along the multi-lane street

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the entire street overhead
large hanging spiral decoration with colorful pink, blue, and purple neon lights
large illuminated advertising screens displaying animated content on building facades
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in large planters
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting the neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The street is illuminated by vibrant neon signs and a large spiral light structure hanging overhead. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights while futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exiting the covered street beneath the overpass into the open intersection
crossing the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians
turning left to follow the sidewalk along the new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding a distinctive red glowing umbrella waiting at the crosswalk
futuristic sedan with headlights on waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
tall building with mix of traditional and futuristic architecture featuring large digital displays
suspended traffic signal arrays with illuminated indicators over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide open intersection filled with neon advertising and crossing pedestrians. The camera crosses the street alongside a crowd, passing a pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella, then turns left onto a new sidewalk lined with palm trees and futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts leading to elevated plaza

events.description: entering the Heywood district area with distinct signage and architectural style
ascending wide concrete stairs into the elevated pedestrian plaza

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk, crossing another street, and ascending stairs into the elevated plaza area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'HEYWOOD' on the building facade
distinctive orange and gray patterned paving tiles on the pedestrian walkway
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading up to the pedestrian plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through the Heywood district along a tiled sidewalk lined with palm trees and digital billboards. The camera passes groups of oncoming pedestrians, crosses a street, and approaches wide stairs leading up to an elevated plaza, ascending into a more sheltered pedestrian area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with seating and overhead neon structures

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian plaza from the street level stairs
slowing down and approaching the bench with seated NPCs for close observation

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and approaching a bench with seated NPCs, ending with a close-up observation of two individuals resting

notable_agents.action: seated male with visible cybernetic legs using a purple tablet device
seated female appearing distressed or tired, leaning forward with head down

entered.detail: modern orange and black benches with people seated, featuring illuminated 'CHANG' text on the base
smooth polished stone flooring reflecting the overhead neon lights
large rectangular concrete planters containing dense tropical vegetation and palm trees
the colorful spiral neon decoration visible again overhead in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Walking through an elevated pedestrian plaza with polished marble floors and overhead neon decorations. The camera approaches a row of benches where NPCs are seated, ending with a detailed close-up of two individuals—one with cybernetic legs using a tablet, and another appearing distressed—highlighting the human stories within the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive scale of a highway underpass into the intimate, human-centric atmosphere of an elevated plaza. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway where wet pavement reflects vibrant neon signs and a large spiral light structure hanging overhead. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection filled with glowing advertisements and crossing pedestrians, including one with a red umbrella, before turning left toward a sidewalk lined with palm trees. The movement then carries through the Heywood district past digital billboards and oncoming crowds, eventually ascending a set of wide stairs that lead away from the street level. Finally, the camera enters a sheltered pedestrian plaza with polished marble floors, gliding toward a row of benches to end in a close-up of two individuals, one with cybernetic legs, highlighting the personal stories within the city.
